pom.xml.general_idea: Update the target Java version property from 1.8 to 21 to align with the JDK 21 migration.
pom.xml.why_exists: Compilation will fail or produce bytecode incompatible with JDK 21 if the source/target version remains at 1.8.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add javadoc doclint suppression options to prevent build failures due to strict documentation checks in newer JDKs.
pom.xml.why_exists: JDK 21 enforces strict doclint checks by default; without suppression, the build fails on minor documentation issues.

pom.xml.general_idea: Configure maven-javadoc-plugin to use the doclint suppression options defined in properties.
pom.xml.why_exists: Without passing the -Xdoclint:none flag, the javadoc generation phase fails on JDK 21.

pom.xml.general_idea: Replace the deprecated Nexus Staging Maven Plugin with the new Central Publishing Maven Plugin for deployment.
pom.xml.why_exists: The old Nexus Staging plugin is deprecated and may fail or be unsupported for new deployments to Maven Central.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update wagon-ssh extension version to 3.5.3 to ensure compatibility with modern SSH protocols and JDK 21.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older wagon versions may fail to connect or handle SSH keys correctly on JDK 21 due to security algorithm changes.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update maven-surefire-plugin version to 3.2.5 to support running tests on JDK 21.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older Surefire versions do not support JDK 21 and will fail to execute tests.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update maven-site-plugin version to 3.9.0 for compatibility with newer Maven and JDK versions.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older site plugins may fail to generate reports or deploy sites on JDK 21.
